title: Strains | Sprains
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Sprains and strains are common musculoskeletal injury categories.
Patient education may include rest, protection, elevation, gradual return to activity, and clinician-directed mobility aids.
Bad sprains may have pain and swelling for several weeks.
Warning signs include worsening pain, swelling, numbness, color change, fever, inability to move, or inability to walk.
